toolPurpose: Retrieve all accessible boards with optional filters by name and state. Returns board IDs, names, descriptions, and metadata.

board_name.description: Filter boards by name (partial match supported)

limit.description: Maximum number of boards to return (default: 25, max: 100)

toolPurpose: Retrieve all items from a specific board with their column values. Returns item IDs, names, and complete column data.

board_id.description: ID of the board to retrieve items from

group_id.description: Filter items by group ID within the board

limit.description: Maximum number of items to return (default: 50, max: 500)

toolPurpose: Create a new item on a board with name and optional column values. Requires Steward confirmation for execution.

board_id.description: ID of the board where the item will be created

group_id.description: ID of the group to place the item in (defaults to first group)

column_values.description: JSON string of column_id to value mappings (e.g., '{"column_id_1": "value", "column_id_2": {"label": "status"}}')

toolPurpose: Update an existing item's column values. Requires Steward confirmation for execution. Tracks GraphQL complexity.

item_id.description: ID of the item to update

column_values.description: JSON string of column_id to value mappings to update (e.g., '{"column_id_1": "new_value"}')

toolPurpose: List all groups within a specified board. Returns group IDs, names, and position information.

board_id.description: ID of the board to list groups from

toolPurpose: Search for items across boards by column value. Enables cross-board item discovery and status tracking.

search_value.description: Value to search for in the column

boards.description: Array of board IDs to search within (leave empty to search all accessible boards)

limit.description: Maximum number of results to return (default: 50, max: 500)
